## Validation / 验证

- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm test:run`
- [ ] `pnpm build`
- [ ] `cargo check --manifest-path apps/kmoe-app/src-tauri/Cargo.toml`
- [ ] `pnpm check:platforms`

## Safety / 安全和合规

- [ ] No credentials, cookies, sessions, tokens, authorization URLs, private local paths, runtime databases, downloads, build artifacts, or copyrighted manga content are committed.
- [ ] This change does not bypass login, membership, quota, verification, anti-abuse, or copyright limits.
- [ ] Product behavior remains live-first; fixtures stay in test directories.
- [ ] Docs are updated when behavior, platform support, release steps, or safety rules changed.
